details: The agent navigated to the correct Wikipedia page and correctly extracted complete laureate data for the 3 most recent years. For 2024, it listed both John J. Hopfield and Geoffrey Hinton (matching known facts). For 2023, it listed all three: Pierre Agostini, Ferenc Krausz, and Anne L'Huillier (matching known facts). The agent also found 2025 data on the page (John Clarke, Michel H. Devoret, John M. Martinis), which supersedes 2022 as the third most recent year since Wikipedia was updated. All co-laureates for each year were reported — no partial answers.
